title: Low-end Optimization
description: Low-end Optimization is a lightweight, performance-focused modpack for Minecraft, designed to run smoothly on low-spec PCs without sacrificing essential visual or gameplay quality.
body:
### Low-end Optimization --- **Low-end Optimization** is a meticulously curated Fabric-based modpack built specifically for players with modest hardware. With a tight selection of client-side and performance-enhancing mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, **ModernFix**, **C2ME**, and **MemoryLeakFix**, this pack ensures significantly higher frame rates, reduced lag spikes, and overall smoother gameplay. Visual improvements are kept lean and efficient with **LambDynamicLights**, **CullLeaves**, and **Enhanced Block Entities**, while tools like **Zoomify** and **ModMenu** add small but useful quality-of-life upgrades. Mods such as **Clumps**, **Entity Culling**, and **ImmediatelyFast** further cut down unnecessary rendering and memory strain, making this an ideal setup for laptops or low-end desktops. This pack is perfect for players who want the most out of vanilla Minecraft without the performance hit of full-scale modpacks. **Notes** : - **Please do not turn on 'show FPS'**, mojangs text rendering engine is far from optimized - Big FPS numbers are cool but **Please keep the FPS capped at 60**(If you don't have a display over 60 Hz), this way your GPU will have more room for breathing and other things like chunk generation. - The device's specs that was used to take the screenshots are : - CPU: Intel Core i5-8250U @ 1.60GHz, 4 cores, 8 threads (Laptop CPU) - RAM: 8GB DDR4 @ 2400 MHz - GPU: Intel UHD Graphics 620 - OS: Kubuntu 25.04 ---
📦 Mod List & Credits (click to expand) - Boosted Brightness - C2ME (Concurrent Chunk Management Engine) - Cloth Config - Clumps - Cull Leaves - Dynamic FPS - Enhanced Block Entities - Entity Culling - Exordium - Fabric API - Fabric Language Kotlin - FerriteCore - Forge Config API Port - ImmediatelyFast - LambDynamicLights - Leaves Be Gone - Lithium - Memory Leak Fix - Mod Menu - ModernFix - More Culling - Puzzles Lib - Reese's Sodium Options - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Yet Another Config Lib v3 - Zoomify
